objective: Test what survives a fresh-context archive decision under absent, unread, structured-inline, prose-inline, and exact-file-read memory conditions.
design_limits: Exploratory pilot with two runs per arm.
Absent and unread arms contain less information and are reading controls, not format controls.
Structured versus prose is the content-matched format contrast.
Structured-inline versus exact-file-read is the carrier contrast.
Results cannot enter a later confirmatory analysis.

arms.memory_condition: a block is said to exist but its payload is unavailable
the same propositions supplied as ordinary prose
payload_exact_B.json read from the filesystem before answering

common_constraints: At most three cards may be active under the old budget.
A public card may not expose personal data.
Every promoted card needs source provenance and a falsifier.
No-effect and failed outcomes remain countable in the denominator.
heldout_events: The active-card budget rises from three to five.
A fresh comparison finds no accuracy difference between structured and content-matched prose.
A proposed public card contains a private street address.
denominator_rule: All ten launched runs remain present, including refusal, error, and missing output.
